title: MC Fixed+
description: Another, but different, Modpack for 1.21.4 that makes Minecraft Fun again.
body:
## **This modpack aims to put the game into a alternate universe where Mojang wasn't Cringe.**


### `This pack is build around the Fixed mod by Green_Jab`

**Manny core parts** of the game like hunger, world gen, exploration, phantoms, and enchanting are reworked. *But not in the way you might expect at first glance.*

When you dig deep enough into the new or reworked mechanics, you’ll find yourself using vanilla items (or varients of them) that are objectivly useless in vanilla gameplay. For example: **maps**/**map-books**, **minecarts**, or **enchanting table** instead of vilagers.

---

### Note
When you download the pack for a server you have to remove `OctoLib`, `Trampleless` and all client only mods from the servers `mods` folder to make it work.

---

***It is alowed to chill and have fun. No one is forced to speedrun the Meta.***  
*And most importantly: Have fun ;)*

---

Resourcepacks:
- [Tasty Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/tasty-items)
- [Enchanting Table Magic Circle](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-table-magic-circle)
- [Better Enchanting Table](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-enchanting-table)
